extraction.one_line_summary: BMC won the 22.7km team time trial by 17 seconds over Quick Step Floors, with Sky suffering a catastrophic wheel failure that appeared to be tubular tire delamination under load.
tactical_patterns: FDJ showed internal coordination issues with Bonnet visibly furious at teammate Maison's ragged pace-setting approaching the finish.
BMC deployed four World Championship TTT medallists (Dennis, Küng, Oss, Quinziato) as revenge motivation against Quick Step after 2016 defeat.
Quick Step Floors nearly matched BMC despite losing a rider late, suggesting they can compete without full complement in short TTTs.

rider_signals.BONNET William: negative: publicly displayed team frustration with Maison's positioning/pacing, indicating FDJ internal cohesion weakness
rider_signals.DENNIS Rowan: positive: led BMC to victory using psychological motivation from previous World Championship defeat to Quick Step
